Looking for the perfect ride to escape the city or cruise around in style this weekend? Whether you’re heading to the coast, exploring the countryside, or just out for a Sunday drive.

🔥 This week’s pick: Mercedes Benz C200
Why we love it:
✅ Sleek, elegant design for standout style
✅ Smooth ride with top-tier comfort
✅ Turbocharged performance for weekend thrills
✅ Perfect for city drives or luxurious getaways

📍Available now at Gari Gurus.
📲 DM us to book a viewing or test drive this weekend!

#WeekendRideVibes #GariGurus #ExploreKenya #RoadTripReady #CarDealsKE #NairobiCars

Looking for flexible car ownership options? Gari Gurus has you covered!

Here’s what we’re offering this month:

✅ Up to 80% financing available — for ANY car year
✅ Selling on your behalf? We do it with a fair commission — and no parking fees
✅ Got a car to trade in? Selected units qualify for trade-in deals
✅ Need help bringing a car from abroad? We import, clear & deliver for you hassle-free
✅ View photos + full specs on our website anytime!

📍Your one-stop shop for all things cars.
📲 DM or call us today and let’s get you rolling!

#GariGurus #CarDealsKenya #CarFinancing #TradeInKenya #BuyAndSellCars #CarImportKenya #NairobiCars

As you hit the road to celebrate with family and friends, remember:
Drive safe. Buckle up. Don’t speed.
Let’s keep the good vibes rolling — and everyone safe.

Wishing you a joyful, peaceful, and road-safe Easter holiday! 💛

#HappyEaster #GariGurus #DriveSafeKE #EasterVibes

See it before you seal it!
All our cars come with clear photos + full specs so you know exactly what you’re getting — no surprises.

🖥️ Browse anytime, anywhere on our website.
Your next ride is just a click away!

#GariGurus #CarDealsKenya #NairobiCars #UsedCarsKE #CarShoppingMadeEasy #KnowWhatYouBuy

Want to upgrade your ride but not sure what to do with your current car?
We trading in your car is as easy as 1-2-3!

Step 1: Take clear photos of your car and send them to us with basic details (make, model, year, condition).

Step 2: Our experts will assess your car and send you a fair trade-in offer — no pressure, no hidden charges.

Step 3: Accept the offer, bring in your car, and drive off in something better. Yes, it's that simple!

💬 What's App us on 0762454500 now to get your trade-in valuation.

#TradeInThursday #GariGurus #CarDealsKenya #UpgradeYourRide #CarTradeIn #NairobiCars #CarGoals
